SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-12-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT ON AUG 4, 2021 FOR THE AMOUNT OF $5,400.00. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF 400.00 A MONTH FOR 13.5 MONTHS STARTING ON 9-1-21 AND ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. PROGRESS REPORTS ARE TO BE SET EVERY FOUR MONTHS. FINAL PROGRESS REPORT TO BE IN NOVEMBER 2022. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE AS AGREED. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT BEING MADE OR ARE STOPPED, AN APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE WILL BE REQUIRED, AT WHICH TIME JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAZA-QUIROZ, OMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAULEY, CHRISTINA $5,556.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,631.00, (JUDGMENT VACATED PER ORDER FILED ON 8-4-21) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CASE CONTINEUED PER DEFENDANT REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY CHRISTINA CAULEY IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. PLAINTIFF OMAR DAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CAULEY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. AFTER EXAMINATION OF THE DEFENDANT, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED AND THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ISSUED ON DECEMBER 19, 2019 IS VACATED. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN OPEN COURT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $5,400.00. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF 400.00 A MONTH FOR 13.5 MONTHS STARTING ON 9-1-21 AND ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. PROGRESS REPORTS ARE TO BE SET EVERY FOUR MONTHS. 1ST PROGRESS REPORT IS SET FOR JANUARY 14, 2022, 2ND PROGRESS REPORT TO BE SET IN JUNE 2022. FINAL PROGRESS REPORT TO BE IN NOVEMBER 2022. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE AS AGREED. IF PAYMENTS ARE NOT BEING MADE OR ARE STOPPED, AN APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE WILL BE REQUIRED, AT WHICH TIME JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
